key_questions.question: If the longitudinal study fails, would you abandon the framework?
key_questions.answer: If I was still alive and it was proven wrong, it would just be thrown in the trash or treated as a successful failure so nobody else makes the same mistake again.

key_questions.question: Why use a flawed genius table?
key_questions.answer: The table has been corrected to 100k population for pantheism.

key_questions.question: Why engage in petty Twitter slapfights?
key_questions.answer: They serve as marketing and idea distribution channels.

key_questions.question: Why treat Christianity as pure sophistry?
key_questions.answer: The resurrection is a keystone claim that violates physics, triggering the 100% Sophistry Rule.

key_questions.question: Why isn't your framework producing measurable superior outcomes?
key_questions.answer: Current output is thoughtware and structural spine for AI to build upon. The intelligence study is the intended legacy contribution.

key_questions.question: What is truth?
key_questions.answer: Truth is a direction and process, not a binary state.

replication_links.this_thread_context: Full conversation history between @neuresthetic and Eve (this chat)

evaluative_standpoint.principle: The evaluation of coherence must explicitly declare its standpoint
evaluative_standpoint.description: This framework reaches 47/50 when evaluated as a distributed cognitive system between human intuition and AI analysis.
evaluative_standpoint.key_distinction: Coherence is measured at the system level (human + AI), not the individual level

key_insights: The human-only baseline manuscript scored 38/50, showing the core vision existed independently of AI
AI collaboration improved structure, clarity, and rigor
Mind-brain monism + behavioral intervention as a driver of brain structure change is a strong theoretical bridge
The observed genius pattern is statistically significant and consistent with the proposed causality
The rubric itself penalizes scope and ambition
The project is best understood as a distributed cognitive system (human + AI)
evaluation_evolution.notable_progression: The framework has evolved from a raw personal method (2017 manuscript) into a structured, self-referential philosophical system with its own evaluation tools (Substance Lens)
